violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw Chicken in refrigerator is above ready-to-eat product.

General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Rear door directly connected to the kitchen was propped open at time of inspection without a screen/screen door.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
